linkedin.text:
A gala dinner on a Mykonos terrace does something a boardroom never will: it tells your top people they've arrived.

Whitewashed walls. Aegean blue. A sunset that becomes the story they retell at next year's kickoff.

We've staged Greek-island gala nights for hundreds — flights, transfers, permits, production handled end to end, so the client only ever sees the magic.

This is the line between a work trip and a reward your people earn their way back to.

Thinking Greece for 2026? Comment "MYKONOS" or book a free 30-min planning call before peak season locks the island.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
We once flew a sales team to Mykonos to celebrate a record year. 🌅

The last night was a gala on a seaside terrace — whitewashed walls, the Aegean going gold, the kind of evening that turns a corporate dinner into a story people retell for years.

Behind it: flights, transfers, permits and production we handled end to end. The team just showed up and felt like they'd arrived.

That's the difference between a work trip and a reward your people remember.

Thinking Greece for your next incentive? Tell us in the comments, or send us a message and let's talk before peak season fills up.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #MICE #LuxuryTravel

image_prompt: Aerial twilight view of Mykonos coastline, whitewashed cube houses cascading down to a dark Aegean sea, iconic windmills silhouetted on a ridge, a distant cluster of hundreds of event guests gathered on a vast seaside terrace lit by warm lanterns, tiny figures from above, deep indigo sky with first stars. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
